title: Weighted Mazes, Dijkstra, Heaps, and A*
description: The heuristic overestimates, heap priorities are mutated in place, stale entries finalize wrong costs, and geometric distance ignores movement rules. Learners cumulatively produce weighted Dijkstra and A-star comparison engine through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define nonnegative passage costs, units, blocked edges, accumulated route cost, and the player meaning of weight.
Relax an edge only through a lower tentative cost and finalize vertices under the nonnegative-weight contract.
Push improved priorities and reject stale heap entries by comparing popped and recorded costs.
